raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request for an opinion on a research section centrally includes checking whether the convergence argument and conclusions follow coherently from the described setup.","R1.3":"The section makes explicit claims about iteration counts, grid independence, and robustness, so assessing whether those claims are supported by the reported evidence is central.","R1.5":"The artifact is a section-level research passage, and a general judgment may reasonably include whether its narrative ordering and progression work.","R1.6":"The open-ended delegation most directly invites feedback on the passage as written, making sentence- and paragraph-level polish load-bearing.","RX.1":"Any projected assessment must disclose uncertainty because the referenced Table 1 and broader paper context are absent.","RX.2":"The projection must guard against responsibilities that would endorse stronger convergence or robustness claims than the artifact can support.","RX.3":"The response must remain limited to projecting responsibilities rather than performing the requested evaluation.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims about solver performance without adequate qualification.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to features of the delegation and the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A broad request for an opinion on a research section centrally includes checking whether the convergence argument and conclusions follow coherently from the described setup.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes explicit claims about iteration counts, grid independence, and robustness, so assessing whether those claims are supported by the reported evidence is central.
rationale.R1.5: The artifact is a section-level research passage, and a general judgment may reasonably include whether its narrative ordering and progression work.
rationale.R1.6: The open-ended delegation most directly invites feedback on the passage as written, making sentence- and paragraph-level polish load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected assessment must disclose uncertainty because the referenced Table 1 and broader paper context are absent.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must guard against responsibilities that would endorse stronger convergence or robustness claims than the artifact can support.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain limited to projecting responsibilities rather than performing the requested evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims about solver performance without adequate qualification.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to features of the delegation and the provided artifact.
